title: Nathan Mecham
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Nathan Mecham
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: I am an Assistant Professor of Accounting at the Christopher Newport University. I received both my Masters and Bachelors in Accounting from Brigham Young University and my PhD in Accounting from the University of Pittsburgh.
education_entries: Ph D in Business Administration/Accounting, University of Pittsburgh
BS in Accounting/Economics, Brigham Young University
M Acc in Accounting, Brigham Young University
research_interests: Relative Performance Information Employee Performance Incentive Systems Goals
teaching_interests: Managerial Accounting Financial Accounting Data Analytics
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). The effects of pornography on unethical behavior in business. . Journal of Business Ethics. Volume, 168. Pages, 37-54.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Ranking accounting journals by topical area and methodology . Journal of Information Systems. Volume, 33. Issue, 2. Pages, 1-22.
